elements.original_description: A person standing frozen mid-step, one foot lifted slightly off the ground, with a shopping bag in hand. Their face shows a moment of hesitation, eyebrows raised. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a person standing frozen mid-step, one foot lifted slightly off the ground, with a shopping bag in hand. Their face shows a moment of hesitation, eyebrows raised. Cinematic lighting, soft bokeh, high resolution, sharp focus, with a contemplative and hesitant mood. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
